compiled_state.title: debug-everything lacks clear instructions for listing bugs via ticket command
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description: The debug-everything SKILL.md does not provide clear, copy-pasteable instructions for how to list open bugs using the ticket CLI. Operators and agents need an obvious reference for the exact command to run (e.g., .claude/scripts/dso ticket list --type=bug --status=open) when entering Bug-Fix Mode or checking remaining bugs.

comments.body: Investigation error: ticket list DOES support --type/--status flags. Original command was correct. No fix needed.
comments.author: Test
